name: ng2-pdfjs-viewer — Live Demo & Feature Explorer
description: The official interactive demo: open PDFs, annotate, search, switch themes, run chromeless/embedded mode, and try the AI assistant and read-aloud — every input and event in one Angular app.

name: CNIL PIA — Privacy Impact Assessment
description: The French data-protection authority's (CNIL) open-source Privacy Impact Assessment tool, published in 20+ languages. Uses ng2-pdfjs-viewer to preview generated PIA reports and attachments in the browser.

name: AOE — Library of Open Educational Resources
description: aoe.fi, a national service of the Finnish National Agency for Education (Opetushallitus) offering open educational resources for every school level. Embeds ng2-pdfjs-viewer to preview PDF learning materials.

name: OC Stormwater Tools (Neptune)
description: Orange County, California stormwater compliance tracking, built by OC Public Works with ESA. Uses ng2-pdfjs-viewer to view inspection and compliance PDFs in the field.

name: turnierplan.NET
description: Open-source tournament-planning application used by sports clubs in Germany. Renders generated match schedules and documents with ng2-pdfjs-viewer.

name: ChatAnyFile
description: An AI app to chat with PDFs, images, audio, and video, built by Angular GDE Luis Aviles. Uses ng2-pdfjs-viewer to display the source PDF alongside the conversation.

name: Artcoded Backoffice
description: Open-source back-office for freelancers (document and administrative management), built with Angular and ng2-pdfjs-viewer to preview PDFs in the browser.
